title_template: La Forêt des Étoiles Perdues avec {child_name}
negative_prompt_default: text, words, letters, writing, captions, harsh lighting, photorealistic, digital art, scary imagery, dark threatening atmosphere
style_rules: Premium watercolor technique with soft, flowing brushstrokes reminiscent of Belgian artistic tradition
Moonlit forest palette with deep blues, silver highlights, and warm golden star-glow
Dreamy, atmospheric rendering with gentle light diffusion
Rich textural details in tree bark, moss, and forest floor
Luminous star effects with subtle sparkle and warm radiance
Cozy, intimate scale appropriate for bedtime reading
Belgian winter evening ambiance with frosted windows and warm interior lighting
Premium watercolor technique with soft, flowing brushstrokes reminiscent of Belgian artistic tradition
Moonlit forest palette with deep blues, silver highlights, and warm golden star-glow
Dreamy, atmospheric rendering with gentle light diffusion
Rich textural details in tree bark, moss, and forest floor
Luminous star effects with subtle sparkle and warm radiance
Cozy, intimate scale appropriate for bedtime reading
Belgian winter evening ambiance with frosted windows and warm interior lighting
visualBible.palette: Deep forest blues and teals, moonlight silver, warm amber star-glow, rich earth browns, soft sage greens, Belgian brick reds, warm golden interior light
visualBible.lighting: Gentle moonlight filtering through canopy, warm golden glow from stars, soft ambient forest light, cozy Belgian home lighting
compositionRules: Child positioned prominently but naturally within scene
Stars as focal light sources drawing the eye
Organic, curved lines following natural forest forms
Intimate framing creating cozy, safe feeling
Balanced negative space to avoid visual clutter

identityRules: Child with large, expressive hazel-brown eyes showing natural wonder and gentle curiosity
Soft, wavy chestnut-brown hair reaching just past the ears, with natural tousled texture
Medium-fair complexion with rosy cheeks from outdoor adventure
Wearing a cozy forest-green wool cardigan with wooden buttons over cream-colored clothing
Average height and proportional build typical for ages 4-7, neither tall nor short
Gentle, slightly rounded facial features conveying innocence and determination
Small hands often positioned in wonder or gentle interaction with magical elements
heroBible.characterDesign: A gentle, curious child aged 4-7 with large hazel-brown eyes full of natural wonder, soft wavy chestnut hair with tousled texture, medium-fair skin with naturally rosy cheeks, wearing a cozy forest-green wool cardigan with wooden buttons over cream clothes, expressing quiet determination mixed with pure awe at the magic around them
forbiddenDrift: Hair color must remain consistent chestnut-brown, never darker or lighter
Eye color must stay hazel-brown, never blue, green, or pure brown
The forest-green cardigan with wooden buttons must appear in every scene
Facial structure and proportions cannot change between scenes
No dramatic emotion shifts - maintain gentle wonder and curiosity only
Hand gestures must remain small and gentle, never dramatic or adult-like
Skin tone and rosy cheek coloring must remain constant throughout

imageGeneration.negativePromptDefault: text, words, letters, writing, captions, harsh lighting, photorealistic, digital art, scary imagery, dark threatening atmosphere

rules: All locales must be semantically aligned
No text should appear within generated images
Hero character appearance must remain consistent
All scenes must be bedtime-safe and gentle
Premium watercolor style must be maintained throughout
Gender-neutral language required across all locales
Belgian cultural elements must be present

editorialScore.rationale: Strong emotional arc with clear discovery-and-return structure, climactic moment on page_4, culturally appropriate for Belgian market, excellent bedtime story qualities

imageabilityScore.rationale: Highly visual scenes with clear composition, magical forest setting provides rich visual opportunities, star effects and watercolor style well-specified

heroConsistencyScore.rationale: Detailed character design with specific appearance rules, comprehensive forbidden drift list, consistent emotional range specified

localeCompletenessScore.rationale: Complete translations for FR/EN/NL with semantic alignment, culturally appropriate adaptations, consistent emotional tone across languages

pages.prompt_template: Premium watercolor illustration of a curious child with hazel-brown eyes and chestnut hair in a forest-green wool cardigan standing in a moonlit enchanted Belgian forest, looking up at a star-filled sky with wonder, soft flowing brushstrokes, magical atmosphere, gentle moonlight filtering through trees, cinematic composition
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, letters, dark scary imagery, harsh shadows, realistic photography, digital art, bright lighting

pages.text_template: Qui sait que même les plus petits gestes peuvent illuminer le monde entier
pages.prompt_template: Premium watercolor close-up of a single glowing star nestled in soft emerald moss on Belgian forest floor, gentle warm golden light radiating, intimate magical atmosphere, delicate flowing brushwork, serene composition with depth
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, letters, complex scenes, harsh lighting, photorealistic style, artificial colors

pages.text_template: Sous les racines nouées du grand chêne, {child_name} découvre une étoile pâle qui murmure des secrets de lumière oubliée.
pages.prompt_template: Watercolor illustration of a gentle child with hazel eyes and chestnut hair in forest-green cardigan kneeling by the gnarled roots of a massive ancient oak tree, discovering a pale, softly glowing star nestled among the roots, moonlit Belgian forest atmosphere, soft flowing brushwork, magical realism, golden light wash
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, bright daylight, harsh colors, scary atmosphere, photorealistic style, digital rendering

pages.text_template: Un renard couleur cannelle de Bruges chuchote : « Viens, {child_name}, tes sœurs étoiles dorment dans les fougères ! »
pages.prompt_template: Watercolor forest scene with a child in forest-green cardigan following a friendly cinnamon-red fox deeper into an enchanted Belgian forest, dim stars scattered like jewels among emerald ferns and undergrowth, dappled moonlight filtering through ancient trees, magical atmosphere, cinematic composition
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, scary predators, dark threatening mood, bright artificial lighting, photorealistic style

pages.text_template: La chouette aux yeux de lune révèle : « Les étoiles s'envolent vers leur palais quand les cœurs tendres leur offrent des mélodies. »
pages.prompt_template: Watercolor illustration of a child in forest-green cardigan listening attentively to a wise, gentle owl with silver-tipped feathers perched on an ancient branch, with a cinnamon-red fox nearby, in a moonlit Belgian forest clearing, soft magical atmosphere, detailed flowing brushwork, warm golden highlights
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, scary owl, threatening wildlife, harsh shadows, photorealistic rendering, cold lighting

pages.text_template: Paupières closes comme pour un vœu de Noël, {child_name} fredonne une berceuse. Les étoiles s'élèvent en spirale dorée, tissant la nuit de fils de lumière !
pages.prompt_template: Magnificent watercolor illustration of a child in forest-green cardigan singing with eyes peacefully closed as fallen stars rise in a beautiful golden spiral toward the night sky, magical climactic moment, warm golden light threads weaving through the air, premium artistic technique, cinematic composition, flowing brushwork
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, static stars, cold lighting, photographic realism, harsh edges, digital art

pages.text_template: Allongés sur l'herbe tendre comme un édredon, {child_name} et les gardiens contemplent leur chef-d'œuvre scintillant au-dessus des sapins wallons.
pages.prompt_template: Serene watercolor scene of a child in forest-green cardigan lying in a soft meadow clearing with a cinnamon-red fox and wise owl, all looking up at a beautifully restored star-filled sky, peaceful atmosphere, gentle starlight washing over the scene, flowing brushwork, Belgian countryside feeling
pages.negative_prompt: text, words, empty sky, restless poses, artificial lighting, digital art style, cold atmosphere

pages.text_template: Dans sa chambre aux murs de brique rouge, {child_name} sourit aux étoiles qui clignotent leurs mercis à travers les carreaux givrés de dentelle.
pages.prompt_template: Cozy watercolor illustration of a child in forest-green cardigan looking out a Belgian-style bedroom window with frosted panes at friendly twinkling stars, warm interior lighting from red brick walls, peaceful bedtime atmosphere, soft domestic details, magical connection to outside, flowing brushwork

pages.text_template: Dans la forêt enchantée, {child_name} a découvert que sa voix porte la magie qui ramène les étoiles chez elles.
pages.prompt_template: Heartwarming watercolor illustration of a child in forest-green cardigan standing with a cinnamon-red fox and wise owl in an enchanted Belgian forest clearing, star-filled sky above, warm magical atmosphere, sense of accomplished friendship and wonder, flowing brushwork, golden light wash

pages.text_template: Chaque soir, {child_name} se rappelle que les petits gestes illuminent l'univers entier.
